What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man with short brown hair wearing a beige button-down shirt stands behind a kitchen island. He gestures with his hands over a white towel with red stripes laid on the counter. A small white bowl sits to the left of the towel near a stainless steel stove. The man stirs a white substance and sprinkles powder onto the towel. A black logo appears in the bottom right corner.

Describe the sequence of actions the man performs with the towel and bowl from the moment he appears until he sprinkles the substance.
canonical_answer: At 4s, the man stands in the kitchen gesturing with hands raised; at 12s, he folds the striped towel in half on the counter; at 16s, he stirs a white substance in a small bowl with a spoon; at 18s, he uses the spoon to sprinkle a white powdery substance onto the towel.
